nasb.text: The king said to her, “Do not be afraid; but what do you see?” And the woman said to Saul, “I see a divine being coming up out of the earth.”

esv.text: The king said to her, “Do not be afraid. What do you see?” And the woman said to Saul, “I see a god coming up out of the earth.”

cnv.text: 王對她說：“不要懼怕。你看見了甚麼？”那女人回答掃羅：“我看見有神靈從地裡上來。”

ccb.text: 扫罗对她说：“不用害怕，你看见什么了？”妇人说：“我看见一个灵从地里上来。”
